description_long: This is a tall, modern floor lamp with a cylindrical, slightly tapered lampshade that transitions from a warm amber-yellow at the top to a deep black at the bottom. The shade is supported by a single, slender, black metal pole that curves at the top, connecting to a rounded, dome-shaped lamp head. The lamp features orange accent rings at the base and at the joint where the pole curves, adding a touch of color contrast. The base is circular and weighted, providing stability, and is finished in black with an orange ring. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or outdoor public spaces.
description: A tall, modern floor lamp with a gradient amber-to-black shade, black curved pole, and orange accent rings. The design is sleek and contemporary, with a stable circular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the lamp, with the pole and orange accent ring centered in front of the gradient shade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved black pole, the dome-shaped lamp head, and the full gradient of the shade from amber to black.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full height and cylindrical shape of the shade, with the dome top and no visible pole details.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing both the curved pole and the gradient shade, with the orange accent ring and base visible.
